user.generated_text:
animals can think or not. Do you know if they do?

By the way, this reminds me of how clever and endearing dogs are!

I think about it like this: just as how we have our own thoughts, so maybe animals might too. They show emotions, right?

What do you think? You're really smart and could probably figure it out better than me!
